name: web-video-v2
description: Turn scripts, articles, lessons, product demos, and talks into click-driven 16:9 web presentations that can be screen-recorded as cinematic videos. Built-in capabilities: (1) bottom subtitle bar showing the current step's narration (single-language, follows author), (2) top hover menu (Restart / Pause / Play / Auto Section / Auto All + speed cycle + PDF download), (3) one-click PDF export of the whole deck (one step = one page), (4) bottom-right page number `{chapter}.{step}` for conversational addressing (e.g. `重寫 2.3`), (5) optional full-screen no-letterbox stage (`?fit=cover` opt-in; default `contain` preserves aspect with letterbox so nothing is ever clipped), (6) Playwright-based visual self-check that walks every step, measures font size, detects overflow, and emits an HTML/JSON report. Ships a Vite + React + TypeScript scaffold, a (chapter, step) cursor model, hard collaboration checkpoints, and a theme-token architecture.
